title: arum italicum subsp. italicum
intro: Arum italicum subsp. italicum, also known as Italian arum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Arum. The plant's rhizomes and roots possess medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Italian arum include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and exhibit antiseptic properties, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies. Italian arum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or ointment, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
